title: Product Options UI — option selector on product page, price calculation, admin CRUD
description:
Implement the frontend for the product option groups feature. Backend API must be DONE before starting this task (depends on p31_backend_product_options).

## New API endpoints available from backend

### Public
- `GET /api/v1/products/{slug}` → ProductDetailResponse now includes `option_groups: [{id, name, is_required, sort_order, values: [{id, name, price_modifier, is_default, sort_order, sku_suffix}]}]`
- `POST /api/v1/products/calculate-price` → body: `{product_id, selected_option_value_ids: [uuid]}` → response: `{product_id, base_price, total_modifier, final_price, breakdown: [{group_name, value_name, price_modifier}]}`

### Admin
- `POST   /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups` → body: `{name, is_required, sort_order}`
- `PUT    /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups/{group_id}` → body: `{name?, is_required?, sort_order?}`
- `DELETE /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups/{group_id}`
- `POST   /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups/{group_id}/values` → body: `{name, price_modifier, is_default, sort_order, sku_suffix?}`
- `PUT    /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups/{group_id}/values/{value_id}`
- `DELETE /api/v1/admin/products/{product_id}/option-groups/{group_id}/values/{value_id}`

### Cart
- Add-to-cart endpoint now accepts `selected_option_value_ids: UUID[]` in the request body

## Part 1 — Product Page: Option Selector Component

### Component: `frontend/components/product/ProductOptionSelector.vue`

Props:
- `optionGroups: ProductOptionGroup[]` — from product detail API
- `modelValue: Record<string, string>` — `{[groupId]: valueId}` (v-model)

Emits: `update:modelValue`

Behavior:
- Render each group as a labeled section with its name
- If `is_required=true`, show required indicator (e.g. asterisk)
- For each value in the group, render a radio-button-style selector card showing: value name + formatted price modifier (`+500 ₽` / `Без доплаты` for 0)
- Pre-select default value (where `is_default=true`) on mount
- Visually highlight selected option
- If a required group has no selection, show validation error state

### Integration into product detail page

Find the product detail page (likely `frontend/pages/products/[slug].vue` or similar).

Changes:
1. Import and place `<ProductOptionSelector>` below the product title/price area
2. Maintain reactive state: `const selectedOptions = ref<Record<string, string>>({})`
3. On selectedOptions change: call `POST /api/v1/products/calculate-price` (debounced 300ms) with `{product_id, selected_option_value_ids: Object.values(selectedOptions.value)}`
4. Show calculated price breakdown:
   - Display `final_price` as the main price (replacing or augmenting base_price display)
   - Show breakdown list below: each selected option modifier as `+ 500 ₽ — Внешняя антенна`
5. When adding to cart: pass `selected_option_value_ids: Object.values(selectedOptions.value)` in the cart request body
6. Validate required groups before allowing Add to Cart: if any `is_required` group has no selection in `selectedOptions`, show error and block the action

### Composable: `frontend/composables/useProductOptions.ts`

Export:
```typescript
function useProductOptions(product: Ref<ProductDetail>) {
  const selectedOptions: Ref<Record<string, string>>
  const allRequiredSelected: ComputedRef<boolean>
  const calculatedPrice: Ref<PriceCalculationResult | null>
  const isCalculating: Ref<boolean>
  
  // auto-selects defaults on product change
  // debounced API call to calculate-price on selectedOptions change
  
  return { selectedOptions, allRequiredSelected, calculatedPrice, isCalculating }
}
```

## Part 2 — Admin Panel: Option Groups CRUD

### Component: `frontend/components/admin/ProductOptionGroupsEditor.vue`

Props:
- `productId: string`

This component is embedded in the product edit page in the admin panel.

Features:
1. List all option groups for the product (from `product.option_groups` already loaded)
2. Add new group: inline form with name, is_required toggle, sort_order input → POST
3. Edit group: click edit icon → inline editing → PUT
4. Delete group: confirm dialog → DELETE (warn: deletes all values in group too)
5. For each group, collapsible sub-list of values:
   - Add value: name, price_modifier (numeric input), is_default toggle, sku_suffix → POST
   - Edit value: inline → PUT
   - Delete value: confirm → DELETE
6. Show sort_order and allow drag-to-reorder (or manual sort_order number input if drag is complex)
7. All operations show loading state and toast notifications on success/error

### Store: `frontend/stores/productOptions.ts` (Pinia)

State: `groups: Record<string, ProductOptionGroup[]>` (keyed by productId)

Actions:
- `fetchGroups(productId)` — reads from product detail, no extra API call needed
- `createGroup(productId, data)` — POST, update state
- `updateGroup(productId, groupId, data)` — PUT, update state
- `deleteGroup(productId, groupId)` — DELETE, update state
- `createValue(productId, groupId, data)` — POST, update state
- `updateValue(productId, groupId, valueId, data)` — PUT, update state
- `deleteValue(productId, groupId, valueId)` — DELETE, update state

### Integration in Admin Product Edit page

Find the admin product edit page (likely `frontend/pages/admin/products/[id].vue` or similar).

Add `<ProductOptionGroupsEditor :product-id="product.id" />` in a dedicated tab or section labeled 'Комплектации'.

## TypeScript Types

Add to `frontend/types/product.ts` (or wherever product types are defined):

```typescript
export interface ProductOptionValue {
  id: string
  name: string
  price_modifier: number
  is_default: boolean
  sort_order: number
  sku_suffix?: string | null
}

export interface ProductOptionGroup {
  id: string
  name: string
  is_required: boolean
  sort_order: number
  values: ProductOptionValue[]
}

export interface PriceCalculationResult {
  product_id: string
  base_price: number
  total_modifier: number
  final_price: number
  breakdown: Array<{
    group_name: string
    value_name: string
    price_modifier: number
  }>
}
```

Extend existing `ProductDetail` type to include `option_groups: ProductOptionGroup[]`.

## UX requirements
- Price modifier format: `+500 ₽` for positive, `Без доплаты` for zero, `-100 ₽` for negative
- Required group without selection: red border + 'Выберите вариант' text below the group
- Add to cart button disabled until all required groups have selections
- Price calculation shows skeleton/loading state during API call
- Responsive: option cards should wrap on mobile

## Files to read BEFORE implementing
- `frontend/pages/` — find product detail and admin product edit pages
- `frontend/components/` — find existing cart and product components
- `frontend/stores/` — find cart store and product store patterns
- `frontend/types/` — find where product types are defined
- `frontend/composables/` — see existing composable patterns
acceptance_criteria: Component ProductOptionSelector.vue renders option groups with radio-card selectors and correct price modifier labels
Default option values are pre-selected on product page load
Selecting options triggers debounced POST /products/calculate-price and updates displayed price
Final price breakdown is shown below price
Add-to-cart is blocked (button disabled + error shown) if required groups have no selection
Composable useProductOptions.ts encapsulates selection state and price calculation
Admin component ProductOptionGroupsEditor.vue allows full CRUD for groups and values
Admin Pinia store productOptions.ts manages groups state with all 6 actions
TypeScript types ProductOptionGroup, ProductOptionValue, PriceCalculationResult defined
